# Backlog Item: BI-260059 - Auth-Method Management (Password, Unlink, Link Google)

- **Date**: 2026-06-23
- **Status**: Done
- **Slice**: S2 (account management)
- **Ready since**: 2026-06-25 — BI-260058 Done provides the account-settings surface to host these actions.

## Description

Add auth-method management to account settings: set/replace password, unlink a method, and link Google —
closing the `AUTH-GOOGLE-NOT-LINKED` recovery loop started on the sign-in page (BI-260056).

## Goals

- `setPassword(newPassword)` with shared validation (e.g. a Google-only user adds a password).
- `unlinkAuthMethod(method)` with the last-method guard (`AUTH-CANNOT-REMOVE-LAST-METHOD`).
- `linkGoogle(idToken)` from settings; handle `AUTH-GOOGLE-EMAIL-MISMATCH`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Setting a compliant password (REQ-CR-260023) succeeds and is reflected in `me`.
- Unlinking is blocked with explanation when it is the last method.
- Linking Google succeeds for a matching email and is reflected in `me`; mismatch is explained.

## Non-goals

- Email change, sign-out-everywhere, delete (BI-260060).

## Dependencies

- BI-260058 (settings surface); BI-260054 (documents, mapper, validation).

## Validation Approach

- Unit: setPassword/unlink/link flows and every error branch.
- E2E: password-account user links Google after the sign-in dead-end; last-method block.
- Quality gates: lint, typecheck, test, test:e2e.
- **Coverage: 100% line + branch on these flows (REQ-QR-260008).**

## Related Artifacts

- **ADR**: ADR-260058, ADR-260057
- **Requirements**: REQ-FR-260066, REQ-FR-260067, REQ-CR-260023

## Done Evidence Block

- New modules (all 100% line/branch/func — json-summary verified, incl. the GIS button):
  - `account-settings/use-account-actions.ts` — `setPassword` (shared validation + server PASSWORD-*
    → field), `unlinkMethod` (server blocks the last → mapped message), `linkGoogle` (email-mismatch
    mapped); each success calls `refetch` to refresh `me`.
  - `account-settings/AuthMethodsSection.tsx` — set-password form, per-method Remove, Link-Google;
    success → `role="status"`, error → `role="alert"`.
  - `account-settings/GoogleLinkButton.tsx` — self-contained GIS credential button (yields idToken
    → `linkGoogle`). Covered to 100% via a GIS-mocked test (the existing auth-entry GoogleSignInButton
    is 0%-covered; this one does better).
- Changed: `use-account-info.ts` gained a silent `refetch` (state set only in query callbacks to
  satisfy `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect`); `AccountSettingsPanel.tsx` composes the section + threads
  `googleClientId`; `App.tsx` → `WorkspaceShell` → panel thread `googleClientId`.
- **Architecture note (forced duplication):** feature modules may not import each other's internals,
  so account-settings could not reuse auth-entry's `AuthField` (uses a plain password input) or
  `GoogleSignInButton` (has its own `GoogleLinkButton`). The clean fix — promoting shared auth UI to
  `ui-primitives` — is a broader refactor; flagged as a candidate, not done here.
- Commands: `npm run lint` → 0; `npm run typecheck` → 0; `npm run test` → 0 (813 passing, 49 files);
  `npm run test:coverage` → all new account-settings modules 100% (json-summary); `npm run test:e2e`
  → 42 passed.
- Rollback: revert the listed files; the account modal reverts to the read-only identity overview.

### Post-review polish (2026-06-25)

External review of BI-260059 raised three points; all resolved while still uncommitted:

- **#1 (fixed) — GIS re-init on parent render.** `GoogleLinkButton` captured `onCredential` directly in
  the GIS effect, so any parent re-render re-ran `initialize`/`renderButton`. Applied the latest-ref
  pattern (`onCredentialRef` updated in its own effect; the GIS effect now depends only on
  `[googleClientId]`). Same pattern as `use-url-token-handoff`.
- **#3 (fixed) — Remove allowed on the sole method.** The server blocks removing the last method, but
  the button was still enabled (relying on a server round-trip to explain). `AuthMethodsSection` now
  computes `isOnlyMethod` and disables Remove with an explanatory `title`; added the
  "disables Remove for the only sign-in method" test (the unlink/pending tests now use a 2-method
  account + `getAllByRole`).
- **#2 (filed) — shared-primitive duplication.** Promoting `AuthField` + the GIS button to
  `ui-primitives` is tracked as **BI-260065** (Refined), not done here.
- Re-verified after the fixes: `npm run lint` → 0; `npm run typecheck` → 0; `npm run test` → 0
  (814 passing, 49 files); account-settings modules still 100% (json-summary); `npm run test:e2e`
  → 42 passed.
